title: Korak 6

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
def pin_extractor(poem):
    secret_code = ''
    lines = poem.split('\n')
    for line in lines:
        print(line)
        

poem = """Stars and the moon
shine in the sky
white and bright
until the end of the night"""

pin_extractor(poem)
challengeFiles.seed:
def pin_extractor(poem):
    secret_code = ''
    lines = poem.split('\n')
    for line in lines:
        print(line)
        

poem = """Stars and the moon
shine in the sky
white and bright
until the end of the night"""

pin_extractor(poem)

tests.text: You should have a words variable inside the loop.
The words variable should have a value of line.split().

description:
n-ta cifra PIN-a je skrivena kao dužina n-te reči u n-tom redu.

Da biste pronašli dužinu n-te reči, sledeći korak je razdvojiti red pesme u listu reči: unutar petlje, kreirajte varijablu words i dodelite joj vrednost line podeljenu na reči korišćenjem metode split.

Zatim, dodajte poziv print sa words kao njegovim argumentom.
